build.cmd: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && BASE_PATH=/growth-platform pnpm run build && node -e "const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');http.createServer((q,s)=>{const f=path.join('./dist/public',q.url==='/'?'/index.html':q.url);fs.existsSync(f)&&!fs.statSync(f).isDirectory()?s.end(fs.readFileSync(f)):s.end(fs.readFileSync('./dist/public/index.html'))}).listen(process.env.PORT||5000)"

pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && BASE_PATH=/ pnpm run build && node -e "const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');http.createServer((q,s)=>{const f=path.join('./dist/public',q.url==='/'?'/index.html':q.url);fs.existsSync(f)&&!fs.statSync(f).isDirectory()?s.end(fs.readFileSync(f)):s.end(fs.readFileSync('./dist/public/index.html'))}).listen(process.env.PORT||5000)"
